tables.title: CPR Quality Metrics in ACLS
rows: Generates adequate blood flow; avoids injury
Allows the heart to refill between compressions
Blood flow falls rapidly when compressions stop

tables.title: Core Team Dynamics Elements
rows: Everyone knows their job before the code starts
"Give epi 1 mg" → "Giving epi 1 mg" → "Epi 1 mg given"
Direct, unambiguous language to a named person
"Sarah, charge to 200 J" instead of "someone charge it"
Say so before attempting a task beyond your skill
"I haven't placed an IO before — can you take this?"
Speak up promptly and respectfully about an error
"That dose was already given two minutes ago"
Reassess rhythm, pulse, and plan frequently
Rhythm and pulse check every ~2 minutes
Professional tone regardless of role or stress
